title: Bridge Essay: Sharpened self-other distinction in attention deficit hyperactivity disorder.
concept: Body as constructed percept — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, ownership plasticity.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Physical De-solidification** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, body ownership as constructed percept.
**Phase context:** Body as constructed percept — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, ownership plasticity.

**Sharpened self-other distinction in attention deficit hyperactivity disorder.** — Neuroimage Clin (2020). DOI: 10.1016/j.nicl.2020.102317. PMID: 32599550. INTRODUCTION: Differentiation between self-produced tactile stimuli and touch by others is necessary for social interactions and for a coherent concept of "self". In attention-deficit-hyperactivity-disorder (ADHD), tactile hypersensitivity and social cognition problems are part of the symptomatology, but pathophysiological mechanisms are largely unknown. Differentiation of self- and non-self- generated sensations might be key to understand and develop novel strategies for managing hypersensitivi
